title: Violations by exhibitor; additional penalties
doc_html:
§252.  Violations by exhibitor; additional penalties

If any person, or officer, or agent thereof, who is licensed as, or holds a license for any theatre, is convicted under the provisions of R.S. 23:251, he shall, in addition to the penalties provided therein, forfeit such license.
doc_text:
§252.  Violations by exhibitor; additional penalties
If any person, or officer, or agent thereof, who is licensed as, or holds a license for any theatre, is convicted under the provisions of R.S. 23:251, he shall, in addition to the penalties provided therein, forfeit such license.
